(DEVICE FILE: N32G030F6S7_SSOP20_SS_N32G030F6)

PACKAGE SSOP20_SS
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 20

PINORDER N32G030F6S7_SSOP20_SS_N32G030F6 BOOT0 NRST PA0 PA1 PA10 PA13 PA14 PA2 PA3 PA4 PA5 PA6 PA7,
      PA9 PB1 'PF0-OSC_IN' 'PF1-OSC_OUT' VDD VDDA VSS
FUNCTION G1 N32G030F6S7_SSOP20_SS_N32G030F6 1 4 6 7 18 19 20 8 9 10 11 12 13 17 14 2 3 16 5 15

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME N32G030F6S7
PACKAGEPROP VALUE N32G030F6S7

END
